original:
"Then this topic serves no more purpose," she says frostily.

"Anything else?"

Her eyes flicker oddly.

"You've revised your position?"

option_line: zgr_omkiScanOfferReduxMil:"My position is one million credits."
original: My position is one million credits.

She leans back ever so slightly, but makes no outward response.

Her expression hasn't changed, but it feels somehow more impatient.

She leans back ever so slightly, but makes no outward response.

Her expression hasn't changed, but it feels somehow more impatient.

Her eyes flicker subtly, her expression more glazed and vacant than before.

"Very... good, captain," she says.

Your comms are routed through a secretary, either a holosim or product of uncanny cosmetic and behavior tuning, then, after a brief wait, the link blinks to Director Glamor-Rotanev.

"Captain $playerLastName," she says, then pauses. "You found something, didn't you."

The comms flick into an active feed nearly instantly.

"Captain," Director Glamor-Rotanev greets you, simply. "I was just admiring your new acquisition."

Her eyes flicker oddly, and you detect what might be a rare spark of genuine amusement. 

"Or perhaps it is better described as your very, very old acquisition."

option_line: zgr_postWeirdOptProceed:"I found... many things. And an Onslaught Mk.I."
original: I found... many things. And an Onslaught Mk.I.
